_comment: Copy this file to tools/voice_keys.json (gitignored) and fill in values from your own game install. No keys are bundled with this repo. Path keys (raw_dir/img_dir/voice_dir) are optional and default under dump_dir.
dump_dir: <path to the parent dir holding your extracted output/ and img_output/>
raw_dir: <optional: path to your extracted output/ tree (default: <dump_dir>/output)>
outer_key_file: <path to your outer-XOR key file; relative paths resolve against tools/>
